title: (SACRAMENTO,CA) –
prompt_preview:

Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem

raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "California has over 20% of its energy generation coming from solar.",
    "Many home and business owners in California are unable to access solar technology due to costs, limited space, or structural challenges.",
    "Roughly 45% of California households are renters who cannot install a solar system.",
    "AB 2316 aims to establish a statewide community solar and storage program in California.",
    "The proposed legislation will significantly expand opportunities for Californians to access solar energy.",
    "Community solar projects allow multiple customers to subscribe and receive credits on their utility bills for power produced.",
    "The legislation seeks to increase the reliability of solar energy by ensuring clean energy is sent to the grid during peak hours.",
    "The program would provide financial incentives for low-income customers to participate in community solar.",
    "Subscribers to community solar would be compensated based on the value of the renewable energy resource.",
    "The legislation would create opportunities for energy customers to save money on their energy bills.",
    "The program aims to support the development of cost-effective community solar plus storage systems in California.",
    "The legislation would provide an option for renters and customers in underserved communities to benefit directly from solar energy.",
    "The program would also give builders alternative means to meet California's ambitious energy code requirements."
  ]
}
```
